jsonLd.title: Cars24 is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Cars24 invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of E-commerce Executive at our Rajkot location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Cars24:
Cars24 is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cars24!
